title: Marvell Technology Earnings Report Dates and Forecasts
text: Marvell Technology, Inc. is a semiconductors company providing networking chips and data center solutions. The company's next earnings report is scheduled for May 27, 2026. Analysts are projecting earnings per share of $0.79 for Q1 FY27, implying 27.4% year-over-year growth. Revenue is estimated to rise by about 27% to $2.40 billion. The company raised its FY2027 revenue outlook to approach $11 billion, more than 30% year-over-year growth versus prior approximately $10 billion guidance. FY2028 revenue is projected near $15 billion, representing approximately 40% year-over-year growth. Recent Q4 FY2026 earnings of $0.80 exceeded the Consensus Estimate. The company has demonstrated strong execution across custom silicon, optical interconnect, and data center segments. Management expects year-over-year revenue growth to accelerate each quarter in fiscal 2027.
